base_annual_fee.source_clause: Fixed Annual Maintenance Fee of INR 6,80,00,000 (Rupees Six Crores Eighty Lakhs only) per annum. The fee is FIXED for the entire 5-year term with NO price escalation mechanism.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly payment of INR 56,66,667 (1/12 of annual fee) payable by the last working day of each month.

escalation.source_clause: NO ESCALATION: The Annual Maintenance Fee shall remain fixed and shall not be subject to any price adjustment, inflation indexation, or revision during the 5-year term of this Agreement.

variable_component.source_clause: NO VARIABLE COMPONENT: The Fixed Annual Maintenance Fee is inclusive of all O&M services. No separate variable charges shall be raised.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Minimum availability guarantee of 94.0% per annum (below typical market, reflecting lower fee). Measured annually April to March.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: LDs of 0.5% of Annual Fee per PP shortfall below 94.0%. Capped at 10% of Annual Fee.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum LD liability per year: 10% of Fixed Annual Maintenance Fee.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: NO PERFORMANCE BONUS: Fixed-fee contract does not include a performance bonus mechanism.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Strict payment terms: 15 calendar days from invoice date. Failure to pay within 15 days triggers automatic interest.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue amounts attract compound interest at the rate of 24% per annum (2% per month) from the due date. This reflects the high-risk nature of the vendor-customer relationship.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 3 months written notice for non-renewal. Short notice period reflects fixed 5-year term with no rollover intent.

validation_warnings: UNIQUE: No escalation and no variable component — simplest contract type in portfolio.
RISK: Late payment interest at 24% p.a. compound is extremely punitive — flag for FC attention.
RISK: 15-day payment terms are the shortest in the portfolio — payment process must be tight.
